title: IShowSpeed challenges KSI to fight again after Jasontheween comparison
summary_full: Internet sensations IShowSpeed and KSI are set for a potential boxing rematch after Speed issued a fiery challenge.  KSI's casual response has ignited the creator boxing world, with even MrBeast and W2S placing six-figure bets on the outcome. This public spat promises an exciting showdown between the two online giants.
